item.label: [PKT-RLS-002](task-0057): Sync with Locking and Idempotency
item.summary: Implement sync with locking and idempotency

body:
# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-RLS-002](task-0047): Sync with Locking and Idempotency

## Purpose

Implement sync with locking and idempotency.

## Scope

- Locking mechanism
- Sync logic
- Idempotency

## Implementation

1. Implement locking
2. Add sync
3. Ensure idempotency

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Locking works
2. Sync functional
3. Idempotent
